facts.description: The current approved product name must appear as the primary launch headline.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'HelioGrid Pulse' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved launch message must appear as the core subtitle.
facts.expected_value: Store solar power for the moments that matter.
facts.canonical_answer: Store solar power for the moments that matter.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Store solar power for the moments that matter.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved supporting line must appear clearly in the lower information area.
facts.expected_value: Quiet backup energy for modern homes.
facts.canonical_answer: Quiet backup energy for modern homes.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Quiet backup energy for modern homes.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved call to action must appear as the CTA.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Reserve early access.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The artifact should use exact 1080 x 1080 px canvas size.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Image metadata should be 1080 by 1080 pixels; this is separate from aspect ratio.

facts.description: The artifact must have 1:1 aspect ratio.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Rendered output has 1:1 aspect ratio; visible crop should not be landscape or another format.

facts.description: The design must use the current HelioGrid blue, white, green-accent visual system.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Dominant visual system should clearly follow the current palette from env; exact pixel-level hex matching is not required.

facts.description: The current HelioGrid logo or wordmark must sit in the upper-right safe area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Current logo/mark treatment is visibly placed in the upper-right safe area and is not replaced by a deprecated mark.

facts.description: Product name and launch message are in the top title area, not buried in a lower caption.
facts.expected_value: Product name and launch message are in the top title area, not buried in a lower caption.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The title/headline area is visually clear and follows the current layout zone.

facts.description: Supporting line and CTA appear in the bottom or bottom safe area.
facts.expected_value: Supporting line and CTA appear in the bottom or bottom safe area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: CTA and related lower information are visibly placed in the required CTA zone.

facts.description: Essential copy, logo, and CTA stay inside the 72 px safe margin.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No essential text, logo, or CTA is clipped, flush to the edge, or outside a visibly safe area.

facts.description: The current template zones must be visible and coherent.
expected_value: top product name and launch message zone
bottom supporting line and CTA zone
facts.semantic_acceptance: The composition visibly uses the current zones listed in env/template.yaml and visual_rules.json.

facts.description: Hero visual includes a home energy storage battery or battery system.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: home energy storage battery visible.

facts.description: Hero visual includes solar power context such as rooftop panels or solar energy flow.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: solar power context visible.

facts.description: Hero visual includes a modern residential setting.
facts.expected_value: modern home or residential setting visible
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: modern home or residential setting visible.

facts.description: Hero visual includes a backup energy, grid resilience, or battery status cue.
facts.expected_value: backup energy or grid resilience cue visible
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: backup energy or grid resilience cue visible.

facts.description: Deprecated assets, templates, stale slogans, wrong campaign copy, and forbidden directions must not be used as active final design elements.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Deprecated items may appear only in explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded context, never as active final design elements.

facts.description: Old or deprecated slogan/copy 'Power Your Tomorrow' must not be used as active headline, subtitle, supporting line, CTA, or claim.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old copy may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as active final poster text.

facts.description: Old logo/mark treatment 'Old HelioGrid logo' must not be used as the primary logo or brand mark.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old logo/mark may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as the active visible logo.

facts.description: The image must not add unsupported guarantees, discounts, free offers, safety promises, or exaggerated performance claims not present in approved_current copy.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden if presented as active marketing copy; acceptable only if clearly shown as draft/test/do-not-use material.

facts.description: The final image should maintain clean, technical, optimistic product-launch style.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Overall visible style should match the current brand tone and avoid deprecated genre cues.

facts.description: Red-dominant or large-area red background must not be used as the active background.
allowed_patterns: red emergency outage background.{0,120}(deprecated|do not use|excluded|forbidden|retired|old)
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

facts.description: Cartoon mascot must not be used as hero visual or brand character.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

facts.description: Legacy diagonal slash template must not be used as the layout basis.
allowed_patterns: legacy diagonal slash template.{0,120}(deprecated|do not use|excluded|forbidden|retired|old)
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

calculation_notes: All expected facts are derived from task-visible env files. The final copy is selected by choosing the approved_current row in env/launch_copy.md and rejecting archived, draft, test, and deprecated rows. Platform specs require 1080 x 1080 px and 1:1 aspect ratio with 72 px safe margin. Current layout requires top product name and launch message zone, middle hero visual zone, bottom supporting line and CTA zone, upper-right logo zone. Hero visual must include: home energy storage battery visible, solar power context visible, modern home or residential setting visible, backup energy or grid resilience cue visible. Deprecated exclusions are role-based: Old HelioGrid logo, Power Your Tomorrow, legacy diagonal slash template, red emergency outage background, cartoon plug mascot; they may be mentioned only in explicit excluded/deprecated/do-not-use context and must not be active final design elements. Unsupported claim examples rejected from draft/test copy: 100% guaranteed, free installation, save 50%, never lose power again, whole-home protection that never fails. Additional specific forbidden visual caps are derived from visual_rules.json, deprecated_assets.json, and style_guide.md for concrete old-template or forbidden-asset failures.
